generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a former NATO strategic planner, I've seen firsthand how our allies are falling behind on defense spending. While some argue we should reduce our commitments, the reality is that our alliances are the bedrock of global stability. Cutting back now would send a dangerous signal to both friends and adversaries. We can't afford to weaken our deterrence posture - the costs of inaction would be far higher than maintaining our current commitments. #NationalSecurity #AllianceStrong
